GoodsToDeclareInfo: If yes, description and value of goods
SignatureDescription: Authorized agent or pilot in command  (signature required if document is printed)
SubmissionInfo: Based on your input this General Declaration should be submitted to: gendec@gov.je; sbgendecs@jersey.pnn.police.uk;
SubmissionInfo2: Note: if more than 13 rows are required, please submit another copy of the declaration with the remaining individuals
SubmissionInfo3: I, being the commander of the above aircraft, do hereby declare that to the best of my knowledge and belief, that this is a true and correct report on the arrival and/or departure of all persons on board. I furthermore declare that I have only the animals and goods noted above and that I have read and understood the Customs notices in respect of items that I must declare.
SubmissionInfo4: I declare that all statements and particulars in this General Declaration, including any supplementary forms presented with it, which are required by virtue of the provisions of (i) the Customs and Excise (Jersey) Law, 1999 and (ii) the Terrorism (Jersey) Law 2002 and/or the Immigration Act 1971, are complete, exact and true to the best of my knowledge and belief.
